# MuleSoft Healthcare

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.24) of Healthcare documentation.
> See [Healthcare llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/llms-full.txt) for all the Healthcare documentation in one file.

## Content

- [C-CDA to FHIR Converter](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/ccda-fhir-converter.md)
- [FHIR R4 Assets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/fhir-r4-assets.md)
- [FHIR R4 Resources](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/fhir-r4-resources.md)
- [FHIR R4 US Core Profile](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/fhir-r4-us-core-profiles.md)
- [HL7 v2 to FHIR Converter](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/hl7-v2-fhir-converter.md)
- [MuleSoft Accelerator for Healthcare](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/index.md)
- [Prerequisites for MuleSoft Accelerator for Healthcare](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/prerequisites.md)
- [Accelerator Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/sfdc-health-cloud-setup-guide.md)
- [SMART on FHIR with Okta](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/smart-fhir-okta.md)
- [X12 to FHIR Converter](https://docs.mulesoft.com/healthcare/latest/x12-fhir-converter.md)
